chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 90 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1041/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.1042/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 26.10.2023 Mr. Ameer Hussain Solangi, Advocate for applicant/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through this bail application, applicant/accused Dargahi alias Naeem Ali S/o Shahmeer Khan Khushk seeks protective bail in Crime No.98 of 2020, registered at Police Station Khan Wahan, District Naushahro Feroze under Sections 302, 427, 148, 149, 337-H, 109 PPC and 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Learned Counsel contends that applicant is innocent, has been falsely implicated in this case. He further contends that applicant is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application U/S 498 CrPC to prove his innocence. However, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrant has been issued against him. Hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 26.10.2023 to 01.11.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicant subject to his furnishing Cr. Bail App. No. D – 90 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrant in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which applicant is directed to surrender before the Court concerned.

D – 90 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrant in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which applicant is directed to surrender before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case applicant fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
